name: pr_cep_ex_lazy_tms_churn
drl:
rule J when $e : E1($t : tag) then insertLogical(new D($t)); end
rule R when exists D() P() then end
_finding: D-161: TMS logical-witness churn - an E1 tag-update re-fires J (insertLogical new-D + TMS retract of the old D, del-then-ins arrival). At a plain exists this COALESCES (R satisfied exactly once through the churn) - same net semantics as explicit churn (c_exists_churn_plain).
